validation_summary.evidence: python -m py_compile on merge_batch.py + test_parallel_invoke.py exits 0 (~0.1s); python -m unittest skills.development-harness.scripts.tests.integration.test_parallel_invoke -v passes 2/2 (2.9s); python -m unittest discover skills/development-harness/scripts/tests passes 171/171 up from 169 (36.1s). PHASE_005 end-to-end green.

checkpoint.summary: PHASE_005 complete. unit_025 added the end-to-end integration test test_parallel_invoke.py under a new tests/integration/ package, plus a _prune_empty_dir helper on merge_batch's success path so .harness/worktrees/<batch_id>/ and the shared worktrees root get cleaned up when the whole batch resolves. Two integration cases cover the happy path (3 disjoint-file units -> dispatch -> fake agents -> merge -> cleanup) and the mixed case (two good + one scope violator -> partial outcome, violator's branch/worktree preserved for inspection). All seven PHASE_005 units landed: 019 dispatch, 020 merge, 021 teardown, 022 scope-violation, 023 lock mutex, 024 sync drift, 025 integration test. Test suite 65 -> 171 across the roadmap so far.
checkpoint.next_action: Run PHASE_005 phase completion review (pr-review-checklist + code-review skill), open PR, autonomous squash-merge per harness-git.md, then advance to unit_026 in PHASE_006 (orchestrator-agent-contract: new templates/claude-code/agents/harness-unit.md with system prompt, tool allowlist, required JSON report schema).
